question: Why is it important to check the radio frequency of a self-built UA?

options.text: Ensure that appropriate Center of Gravity is applied.
Ensure no loose wires can come into contact with the spinning propellers.
Prevent radio systems from being interfered with or interfering with other radio equipment.
Ensure all screws securely fastened and applied with cable tie if necessary.

classification_notes: Radio frequency is part of the command-and-control link.
